title: Junior Investment Banker at Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners
company: Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Dhanbad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners:
Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners!
